datasetAgreementGeneral: This Cox Proportional Hazards model is developed for survival analysis in oncological research. Access is restricted to qualified senior researchers with demonstrated experience in biostatistics and cancer research.
term1: You acknowledge that this model is designed exclusively for survival analysis research and must not be applied to clinical decision-making without appropriate validation.
term2: You agree not to use this model for any illegal, unethical, or harmful activities.
term3: You are required to provide proper attribution to the model developers in any publications, reports, or presentations.
term4: You accept that all outcomes based on results from this model are solely at your discretion and the developers disclaim any liability.
term5: You agree to share any modifications or enhancements made to the model with the original developers.
